sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51735" key="kaqekte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθεκ-τέον</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κατέχω</etym>) <sense id="n51735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must keep back, restrain</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg050:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Mi.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
